bugs.error_message: Coding Moments page: 'No Loadable Images Found' — 7 image moments detected but getSessionImages returned [] for every CLI/Claude session
bugs.root_cause: Two layered gaps: (1) extractSessionImages only parses the VS Code Copilot file format (kind:0/2 state log); Claude .jsonl stores images as message.content[] blocks {type:'image', source:{type:'base64',media_type,data}} keyed by the line uuid. (2) Deeper: external-harness sessions (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) are collected via parser-harnesses HarnessCollectionContext which only carries {workspaces, sessions} and never registers a SessionSource, so sessionSourceIndex.get(sessionId) misses for all Claude sessions and getSessionImages hit `if(!source) return {images:[]}`.
bugs.fix: Added extractCliSessionImages(filePath, requestId) in parser-claude.ts (matches line by uuid, converts base64 image-block sources to data: URIs, caps at 4). Stamped session.sourceFilePath in parseClaudeSessionFile (sessionId is NOT reliably the filename). getSessionImages now: dispatches sessionSourceIndex entries on kind, then falls back to session.sourceFilePath for harness==='Claude'. Bumped CACHE_VERSION 9->10 so persisted sessions re-parse with the new field. CSP already allows img-src data:.

bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: upToDate

bugs.error_message: Sidecar-side changes (image fix, CACHE_VERSION bump) never reached the running IDE despite rebuilds; runtime/0.1.0/main.js stayed stale
bugs.root_cause: ensureExtracted (commit 3be5121) detected 'dev sandbox' via getResource('/sidecar/main.js').protocol=='file' and only then skipped the isComplete() short-circuit. But the IntelliJ runIde sandbox packages the plugin as plugin-0.1.0.jar, so the protocol is 'jar', inDevSandbox=false, isComplete(stale files)=true -> the first-ever extraction was reused forever. Version string (0.1.0) never changes between dev builds. Webview app.js was unaffected (served from JAR by AssetSchemeHandler, not extracted), which masked the bug — only sidecar main.js changes silently failed to load.
bugs.fix: Replaced the file://-vs-jar:// heuristic with a content fingerprint: hash the bundled /sidecar/main.js (SHA-256), store it as runtime/<ver>/.bundle-hash, and re-extract whenever the extraction is incomplete or the stored hash != current. Correct for dev (rebuilt bundle) and prod (plugin update) regardless of version-dir name. Verified: fresh runIde re-extracted main.js with the fix and cache re-parsed to version 10.

bugs.error_message: CI: :plugin:buildPlugin -> buildSidecar failed: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND Cannot find package 'esbuild' imported from sidecar/esbuild.mjs
bugs.root_cause: The Gradle 'plugin' job runs buildPlugin which triggers buildSidecar (npm run build -> esbuild). But the job set up only JDK+Gradle: no Node, no synced sidecar/vendor tree, and no sidecar node_modules. esbuild (a devDependency) was absent, and vendor/ (gitignored, sync-populated) was missing too.
bugs.fix: Added to the plugin job before buildPlugin: Set up Node 20, `node tools/sync-upstream.mjs --skip-tests` (populate sidecar/vendor), and `npm ci` in sidecar (install esbuild + deps). Mirrors the sidecar job's setup. buildPlugin verified green locally.

bugs.error_message: Harness filter does not show GitHub Copilot CLI despite ~/.copilot/session-state having sessions on this device
bugs.root_cause: GitHub Copilot CLI dirs (~/.copilot/session-state, history-session-state) are discovered inside findVsCodeDirs() and parsed via the VS Code CLI-events path (harness 'GitHub Copilot CLI'). Patch 0002 dropped ALL of findLogsDirs() to [], removing the Copilot CLI dirs too — even though D8 / the patch comment say Copilot CLI is a collected harness. collectExternalHarnesses only covers Claude/Codex/OpenCode, so Copilot CLI fell through the cracks and never parsed.
bugs.fix: Regenerated patch 0002 so findLogsDirs() returns findVsCodeDirs().filter(d => d.includes('.copilot')) — keeps Copilot CLI, still drops VS Code workspaceStorage + Xcode (D8). Updated the parser-main.test.ts assertion accordingly. Verified: getHarnesses now returns ['Claude','GitHub Copilot CLI','OpenCode']; 1158 vendored tests green. VS Code Copilot Chat (workspaceStorage) remains intentionally deferred per D8.

bugs.error_message: Dashboard stuck on 'Building Activity Index' spinner after a theme change (open/close works, theme switch hangs)
bugs.root_cause: WebviewThemeSync called browser.cefBrowser.reload() on theme change. The webview waits for the sidecar's one-shot 'dataReady' push before fetching/rendering. dataReady is sent once per sidecar connection (on first parse). A soft reload restarts app.js on the SAME bridge/connection, so the sidecar never re-emits dataReady — the reloaded page waits forever. (A close/reopen makes a NEW connection, which re-handshakes and re-emits dataReady, which is why open/close worked.)
bugs.fix: Removed the soft reload (and the load-gate/second load handler) from WebviewThemeSync. Theme changes now do live :root CSS-variable injection only (executeJavaScript setProperty) — the whole CSS UI recolors instantly with no reload, so nothing hangs. Chart.js (colors captured at mount) fully recolors when the tool window is reopened.
